title: params.rs verifies hash before writing to disk — correct, not after
description: ensure_param_file verifies the BLAKE2b-512 hash of downloaded bytes in memory before writing to disk (line 239). A naive implementation would write first then hash, leaving a corrupt or tampered file on disk if verification fails. The current approach means the temp file and final path only ever contain verified bytes. A contributor might reorder to verify-after-write to avoid holding 48MB in memory, but that would allow a brief window where a bad file exists on disk.
